spec.precondition: requires valid(alloc) && valid(tensor) && addr.chunk >= 0 && addr.chunk < alloc->n_chunks && valid(alloc->chunks[addr.chunk]) && exists i in 0..1024: (alloc->allocated_tensors[i].addr.chunk == addr.chunk && alloc->allocated_tensors[i].addr.offset == addr.offset && alloc->allocated_tensors[i].tensor != NULL)
spec.postcondition: ensures exists i in 0..1024: (alloc->allocated_tensors[i].addr.chunk == addr.chunk && alloc->allocated_tensors[i].addr.offset == addr.offset && alloc->allocated_tensors[i].tensor == NULL) && forall j in 0..1024: (j != i ==> alloc->allocated_tensors[j] == old(alloc->allocated_tensors[j]))
